question: Jaká je celková výše internetových tržeb?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké je celkové internetové objednané množství?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Order Quantity]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je celková internetová částka daně?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Tax Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké jsou celkové internetové náklady na dopravu?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Freight Cost]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké jsou celkové internetové náklady na produkty?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je internetový hrubý zisk (internetové tržby minus celkové internetové náklady na produkty)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je internetová hrubá marže (hrubý zisk dělený internetovými tržbami)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Margin] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] = 0, NULL, ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]) / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Margin]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je průměrná výše internetových tržeb na jednu internetovou objednávku?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Avg Internet Sales Per Order] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Order Count] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] / [Measures].[Internet Order Count]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Avg Internet Sales Per Order]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je průměrný počet položek na jednu internetovou objednávku?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Avg Items Per Internet Order] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Order Count] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Order Quantity] / [Measures].[Internet Order Count]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Avg Items Per Internet Order]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké procento internetových tržeb tvoří internetová částka daně?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Tax Percent] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Tax Amount] / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Tax Percent]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaké procento internetových tržeb tvoří internetové náklady na dopravu?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Freight Percent] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Freight Cost] / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Freight Percent]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je výše internetových tržeb na jednu internetovou transakci?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Sales Per Transaction] AS IIF([Measures].[Internet Transaction Count] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] / [Measures].[Internet Transaction Count]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Sales Per Transaction]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je celková výše tržeb resellerů?
mdx_query: SELECT {[Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je hrubý zisk resellerů (tržby resellerů minus celkové náklady resellerů na produkty)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je rozdíl mezi internetovými tržbami a tržbami resellerů?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Minus Reseller Sales] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Minus Reseller Sales]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký podíl celkových tržeb (internet + reseller) pochází z internetových tržeb?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Sales Share] AS IIF(([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount]) = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] / ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount])) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Internet Sales Share]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je kombinovaná výše tržeb (internet + reseller)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Sales Amount] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Sales Amount]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je kombinovaný hrubý zisk (internet + reseller)?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost] MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost] MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] AS [Measures].[Calc Internet Gross Profit] + [Measures].[Calc Reseller Gross Profit] SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaká je celková hrubá marže při použití kombinovaných internetových tržeb a tržeb resellerů?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] AS ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]) + ([Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount] - [Measures].[Reseller Total Product Cost]) MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Margin] AS IIF(([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount]) = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Profit] / ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount])) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Combined Gross Margin]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]

question: Jaký je poměr počtu internetových objednávek k počtu zákazníků?
mdx_query: WITH MEMBER [Measures].[Calc Orders Per Customer] AS IIF([Measures].[Customer Count] = 0, NULL, [Measures].[Internet Order Count] / [Measures].[Customer Count]) SELECT {[Measures].[Calc Orders Per Customer]} ON COLUMNS FROM [Adventure Works]
